_meta.resume_note: Audited Shasta College's complete 2025-2026 Interest Areas award inventory and the Spring 2026 catalog addendum. Neither contains a general Economics award.

none_found_sources.locator: Interest Areas, catalog pages 21-26; complete Degrees and Certificates inventory contains no Economics award
Chapter 3: Programs of Study, addendum page 2; explicitly reports no program updates

notes: The complete 2025-2026 award inventory includes Business, Marketing and Finance, and broad Social Sciences pathways but no Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS. Those adjacent awards are outside this pass, and the Spring addendum makes no program changes.
